description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:18.10 Docker image with a single build stage. Define a job named build that runs in the build stage. In its before_script, update apt and install python3, python3-pip, g++, git, ninja-build, libboost-all-dev, libgl1-mesa-dev, libglu1-mesa-dev, freeglut3-dev, libgtest-dev and cmake; then compile Google Test by creating /tmp/gtest_build, running cmake /usr/src/gtest, make -j, and copying the resulting *.a files to /usr/local/lib; finally install meson via pip3 and return to the previous directory. In the script section, run `meson --prefix=$(pwd)/target --buildtype=release build` and then `cd build && meson test --suite design_patterns_examples:auto`. Cache the build/ directory.
